# SaaS Landing Page Proof Audit

## Goal

Find where a SaaS page asks for belief without giving enough proof.

## Audit sections

- Hero promise
- Mechanism explanation
- Product screenshots/demo
- Social proof
- Reviews/case studies
- Integrations
- Security/trust
- Pricing
- Setup/migration
- Limitations
- CTA risk

## Output

```markdown
# Landing Page Proof Audit

## Claims that need proof
## Missing proof sections
## Skeptical-buyer blockers
## Above-the-fold rewrite
## Demo/proof assets needed
## Suggested tests
```
